algorithm: registered datapath with ready-valid handshake and bubble-free buffering
core_function: AXI4-Stream skid buffer register with configurable data and control fields

interface.input: clk, rst, s_axis_tdata, s_axis_tkeep, s_axis_tvalid, s_axis_tlast, s_axis_tid, s_axis_tdest
interface.output: s_axis_tready, m_axis_tdata, m_axis_tkeep, m_axis_tvalid, m_axis_tlast, m_axis_tid, m_axis_tdest, m_axis_tuser

name: axis_register
